title: SweechBar notification center widget
description: macOS widget showing current usage status in Notification Center.

context.text: WidgetKit requires Xcode project target + WidgetExtension bundle. Current SPM-only setup needs migration to xcodeproj first.
Migrated from SPM to Xcode project via xcodegen. SweechBarWidget extension with WidgetKit. Small+Medium widget sizes. Both targets build.

acceptanceCriteria: Small widget: top account + usage bar
Updates on same interval as menu bar
